settings.title: Overview
settings.content: At SheyeOladejo, every order is confirmed with intention. All payments must be completed and verified before production or dispatch begins.

settings.title: Accepted Payment Methods
settings.content:
We offer secure and flexible payment options to serve our global clientele:
Debit and Credit Card payments
Bank Transfers (NGN, USD, GBP, EUR accounts)
All available payment options will be displayed at checkout.

settings.title: Payment Confirmation
settings.content:
Orders are processed only after full payment has been successfully received and confirmed.
For card payments, confirmation is typically immediate
For bank transfers, processing begins once payment is verified
Delays in payment confirmation may affect production or delivery timelines.

settings.title: Ready-to-Wear Orders
settings.content:
All ready-to-wear purchases require full payment at checkout.
Orders are prepared for dispatch only after payment confirmation.

settings.title: Couture & Custom Orders
settings.content:
Due to the nature of bespoke production:
A deposit or full payment is required before work begins
Payment structure will be communicated during consultation
Production will not commence until the agreed payment has been received.

settings.title: Currency & International Payments
settings.content:
We accept payments in multiple currencies through our international accounts:
Nigerian Naira (NGN)
US Dollars (USD)
British Pounds (GBP)
Euros (EUR)
Currency conversion rates may be applied by your payment provider.

settings.title: Payment Verification & Security
settings.content:
For security purposes, all payments may be subject to verification.
SheyeOladejo reserves the right to:
Request additional confirmation for certain transactions
Decline or cancel orders flagged as high-risk
This is part of our commitment to protecting both the brand and our clients.

settings.title: Failed or Incomplete Payments
settings.content:
Orders with incomplete or failed payments will not be processed.
If a payment issue occurs:
The order will remain pending until resolved
Items are not reserved until payment is confirmed

settings.title: Refund Policy
settings.content:
SheyeOladejo does not offer cash refunds.
Where applicable:
Eligible returns are issued as store credit
Custom, couture, and made-to-measure orders are non-refundable
This aligns with the nature of our production and design process.

settings.title: Chargebacks & Disputes
settings.content:
Initiating a chargeback without first contacting the Brand may delay resolution.
We encourage clients to reach out directly so we can resolve concerns with care and clarity.

settings.title: Final Note
settings.content:
Every transaction is part of a considered experience. We encourage clients to confirm sizing, timelines, and order details before completing payment.
For guidance, our team is available via WhatsApp prior to purchase.
